mapper.select: SELECT num, COUNT(*) AS count FROM ( SELECT drwt_no1 AS num FROM lotto UNION ALL SELECT drwt_no2 FROM lotto UNION ALL SELECT drwt_no3 FROM lotto UNION ALL SELECT drwt_no4 FROM lotto UNION ALL SELECT drwt_no5 FROM lotto UNION ALL SELECT drwt_no6 FROM lotto ) AS combined_numbers GROUP BY num ORDER BY num ASC

SELECT (SELECT drwt_no FROM ( SELECT drwt_no1 AS drwt_no FROM lotto UNION ALL SELECT drwt_no2 FROM lotto UNION ALL SELECT drwt_no3 FROM lotto UNION ALL SELECT drwt_no4 FROM lotto UNION ALL SELECT drwt_no5 FROM lotto UNION ALL SELECT drwt_no6 FROM lotto ) u1 GROUP BY drwt_no ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1) AS max,
(SELECT drwt_no FROM ( SELECT drwt_no1 AS drwt_no FROM lotto UNION ALL SELECT drwt_no2 FROM lotto UNION ALL SELECT drwt_no3 FROM lotto UNION ALL SELECT drwt_no4 FROM lotto UNION ALL SELECT drwt_no5 FROM lotto UNION ALL SELECT drwt_no6 FROM lotto ) u2 GROUP BY drwt_no ORDER BY COUNT(*) ASC LIMIT 1) AS min;

SELECT num FROM ( SELECT num, MAX(latest.max_drw_no) - MAX(drw_no) AS gap_now FROM ( SELECT drw_no, drwt_no1 AS num FROM lotto UNION ALL SELECT drw_no, drwt_no2 FROM lotto UNION ALL SELECT drw_no, drwt_no3 FROM lotto UNION ALL SELECT drw_no, drwt_no4 FROM lotto UNION ALL SELECT drw_no, drwt_no5 FROM lotto UNION ALL SELECT drw_no, drwt_no6 FROM lotto ) t CROSS JOIN (SELECT MAX(drw_no) AS max_drw_no FROM lotto) latest GROUP BY num ) t2 ORDER BY gap_now DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT num FROM ( SELECT t3.num, ABS(t3.gap_now - t2.avg_gap) AS diff FROM ( -- 평균 gap SELECT num, AVG(gap) AS avg_gap FROM ( SELECT num, drw_no - LAG(drw_no) OVER (PARTITION BY num ORDER BY drw_no) AS gap FROM ( SELECT drw_no, drwt_no1 AS num FROM lotto UNION ALL SELECT drw_no, drwt_no2 FROM lotto UNION ALL SELECT drw_no, drwt_no3 FROM lotto UNION ALL SELECT drw_no, drwt_no4 FROM lotto UNION ALL SELECT drw_no, drwt_no5 FROM lotto UNION ALL SELECT drw_no, drwt_no6 FROM lotto ) t ) t2 WHERE gap IS NOT NULL GROUP BY num ) t2 JOIN ( -- 현재 gap SELECT num, MAX(latest.max_drw_no) - MAX(drw_no) AS gap_now FROM ( SELECT drw_no, drwt_no1 AS num FROM lotto UNION ALL SELECT drw_no, drwt_no2 FROM lotto UNION ALL SELECT drw_no, drwt_no3 FROM lotto UNION ALL SELECT drw_no, drwt_no4 FROM lotto UNION ALL SELECT drw_no, drwt_no5 FROM lotto UNION ALL SELECT drw_no, drwt_no6 FROM lotto ) t CROSS JOIN (SELECT MAX(drw_no) AS max_drw_no FROM lotto) latest GROUP BY num ) t3 ON t2.num = t3.num ) t ORDER BY diff ASC LIMIT 6;
